name: E-z Mic Pnut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave chocolate, butter, and milk in a microwave-safe bowl for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes at MED-HIGH (70%), until the butter looks melted.
2. Stir until smooth and chocolate is melted. Stir in vanilla; beat in sugar gradually until the mixture is smooth and creamy but not crumbly.
3. Fold in nuts. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill to firm (20 minutes).
